item.title: Everything I Built in 2.5 Weeks With AI
item.description: The full list of what one solo builder shipped in 2.5 weeks with AI tools, a $12 server, and zero computer science background.

item.title: Claude Code SSH'd Into My Server and Spawned Claude Code There
item.description: I installed a CLI tool. Weeks later it SSH'd into my server and ran itself. This is that story.

item.title: How I Accidentally Built an AI Orchestrator
item.description: I didn't set out to build a system. I set out to stop repeating myself.

item.title: About
item.description:
i am spiz. Spirit, Power, Intimacy, Zeal — JustPassingBy.

I build Agentic AI Systems.

Not because I studied computer science. I built them because I got tired of repeating the same instructions to every new AI tool that came along…because i had to try them all. One fix turned into another. Then another. I wanted everything up to date wiht the same skill/knowledge…etc. One ring to bind them. Eventually the fixes and migrations connected to each other and I realized I had accidentally built an architecture.
